channel.title: Stars on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Stars on Arrans github.io

item.title: docmost/docmost
item.description: Docmost is an open-source collaborative wiki and documentation software. It is an open-source alternative to Confluence and Notion.

item.title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
item.description: FULL v0, Cursor, Manus, Same.dev, Lovable, Devin, Replit Agent, Windsurf Agent, VSCode Agent, Dia Browser & Trae AI (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Tools & AI Models.

item.title: LadybirdBrowser/ladybird
item.description: Truly independent web browser

item.title: haotian-liu/LLaVA
item.description: [NeurIPS'23 Oral] Visual Instruction Tuning (LLaVA) built towards GPT-4V level capabilities and beyond.

item.title: lucasg/Dependencies
item.description: A rewrite of the old legacy software “depends.exe” in C# for Windows devs to troubleshoot dll load dependencies issues.

item.title: clidey/whodb
item.description: A lightweight next-gen data explorer - Postgres, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis, MariaDB, Elastic Search, and Clickhouse with Chat interface

item.title: arp242/goatcounter
item.description: Easy web analytics. No tracking of personal data.

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: mealie-recipes/mealie
item.description: Mealie is a self hosted recipe manager and meal planner with a RestAPI backend and a reactive frontend application built in Vue for a pleasant user experience for the whole family. Easily add recipes into your database by providing the url and mealie will automatically import the relevant data or add a family recipe with the UI editor

item.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: restic/restic
item.description: Fast, secure, efficient backup program

item.title: bionic-gpt/bionic-gpt
item.description: BionicGPT is an on-premise replacement for ChatGPT, offering the advantages of Generative AI while maintaining strict data confidentiality

item.title: ArchiveBox/ArchiveBox
item.description: 🗃 Open source self-hosted web archiving. Takes URLs/browser history/bookmarks/Pocket/Pinboard/etc., saves HTML, JS, PDFs, media, and more…

item.title: google-ai-edge/gallery
item.description: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.

item.title: fishaudio/fish-speech
item.description: SOTA Open Source TTS

item.title: logseq/logseq
item.description: A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Download link: http://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases. roadmap: http://trello.com/b/8txSM12G/roadmap

item.title: getmaxun/maxun
item.description: ⚡️ Open Source No Code Web Data Extraction Platform • Turn Websites To APIs & Spreadsheets In Minutes ⚡️

item.title: microsoft/typescript-go
item.description: Staging repo for development of native port of TypeScript

item.title: Kareadita/Kavita
item.description: Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

item.title: starship/starship
item.description: ☄🌌️ The minimal, blazing-fast, and infinitely customizable prompt for any shell!

item.title: advplyr/audiobookshelf
item.description: Self-hosted audiobook and podcast server

item.title: posquit0/Awesome-CV
item.description: 📄 Awesome CV is LaTeX template for your outstanding job application

item.title: kelseyhightower/nocode
item.description: The best way to write secure and reliable applications. Write nothing; deploy nowhere.

item.title: gravitational/teleport
item.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

item.title: spotDL/spotify-downloader
item.description: Download your Spotify playlists and songs along with album art and metadata (from YouTube if a match is found).

item.title: fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
item.description: A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Assistants API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-4o, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active project.

item.title: tmc/langchaingo
item.description: LangChain for Go, the easiest way to write LLM-based programs in Go

item.title: mattermost-community/focalboard
item.description: Focalboard is an open source, self-hosted alternative to Trello, Notion, and Asana.

item.title: sharkdp/numbat
item.description: A statically typed programming language for scientific computations with first class support for physical dimensions and units

item.title: iib0011/omni-tools
item.description: Self-hosted collection of powerful web-based tools for everyday tasks. No ads, no tracking, just fast, accessible utilities right from your browser!

item.title: 42wim/matterbridge
item.description: bridge between mattermost, IRC, gitter, xmpp, slack, discord, telegram, rocketchat, twitch, ssh-chat, zulip, whatsapp, keybase, matrix, microsoft teams, nextcloud, mumble, vk and more with REST API (mattermost not required!)

item.title: dbeaver/cloudbeaver
item.description: Cloud Database Manager

item.title: dagger/dagger
item.description: An open-source runtime for composable workflows. Great for AI agents and CI/CD.

item.title: UberGuidoZ/Flipper
item.description: Playground (and dump) of stuff I make or modify for the Flipper Zero

item.title: tldr-pages/tldr
item.description: 📚 Collaborative cheatsheets for console commands

item.title: Betterbird/thunderbird-patches
item.description: Betterbird is a fork of Mozilla Thunderbird. Here are the patches that provide all the goodness.

item.title: anyproto/anytype-ts
item.description: Official Anytype client for MacOS, Linux, and Windows

item.title: Mobile-Artificial-Intelligence/maid
item.description: Maid is a cross-platform Flutter app for interfacing with GGUF / llama.cpp models locally, and with Ollama and OpenAI models remotely.

item.title: gentoo/gentoo
item.description: [MIRROR] Official Gentoo ebuild repository

item.title: alphacep/vosk-api
item.description: Offline speech recognition API for Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi and servers with Python, Java, C# and Node

item.title: menloresearch/jan
item.description: Jan is an open source alternative to ChatGPT that runs 100% offline on your computer

item.title: f/awesome-chatgpt-prompts
item.description: This repo includes ChatGPT prompt curation to use ChatGPT and other LLM tools better.

item.title: dani-garcia/vaultwarden
item.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

item.title: CodeEditApp/CodeEdit
item.description: 📝 CodeEdit App for macOS – Elevate your code editing experience. Open source, free forever.

item.title: BurntSushi/ripgrep
item.description: ripgrep recursively searches directories for a regex pattern while respecting your gitignore

item.title: jj-vcs/jj
item.description: A Git-compatible VCS that is both simple and powerful

item.title: flameshot-org/flameshot
item.description: Powerful yet simple to use screenshot software 🖥️ 📸

item.title: cline/cline
item.description: Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.

item.title: astral-sh/uv
item.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

item.title: knadh/listmonk
item.description: High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.

item.title: lanedirt/AliasVault
item.description: A self-hostable, end-to-end encrypted password manager with a built-in alias generator and email server.

item.title: microsoft/WSL
item.description: Windows Subsystem for Linux

item.title: EngineersNeedArt/SystemSix
item.description: e-Ink Calendar

item.title: ollama/ollama
item.description: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, DeepSeek-R1, Phi-4, Gemma 3, Mistral Small 3.1 and other large language models.

item.title: toeverything/AFFiNE
item.description: There can be more than Notion and Miro. AFFiNE(pronounced [ə‘fain]) is a next-gen knowledge base that brings planning, sorting and creating all together. Privacy first, open-source, customizable and ready to use.

item.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases
item.description: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

item.title: openai/openai-cookbook
item.description: Examples and guides for using the OpenAI API

item.title: donnemartin/system-design-primer
item.description: Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview. Includes Anki flashcards.

item.title: assafelovic/gpt-researcher
item.description: LLM based autonomous agent that conducts deep local and web research on any topic and generates a long report with citations.

item.title: automatisch/automatisch
item.description: The open source Zapier alternative. Build workflow automation without spending time and money.

item.title: vllm-project/vllm
item.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: syncthing/syncthing
item.description: Open Source Continuous File Synchronization

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 Open Source JIRA, Linear, Monday, and Asana Alternative. Plane helps you track your issues, epics, and cycles the easiest way on the planet.

item.title: BerriAI/litellm
item.description: Python SDK, Proxy Server (LLM Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI format - [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, Replicate, Groq]

item.title: nextcloud/server
item.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

item.description: An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

item.title: imputnet/cobalt
item.description: best way to save what you love

item.title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
item.description: Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is the AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The leading open source Notion alternative.

item.description: A self-hostable bookmark-everything app (links, notes and images) with AI-based automatic tagging and full text search

item.description: 💻 A fully functional local AWS cloud stack. Develop and test your cloud & Serverless apps offline

item.description: Building event-driven applications the easy way in Go.

item.description: A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

item.description: Convert ebooks to audiobooks with chapters and metadata using dynamic AI models and voice cloning. Supports 1,107+ languages!

item.title: usememos/memos
item.description: A modern, open-source, self-hosted knowledge management and note-taking platform designed for privacy-conscious users and organizations.

item.title: zed-industries/zed
item.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.

item.description: An actor-based Framework with network transparency for creating event-driven architecture in Golang. Inspired by Erlang. Zero dependencies.

item.title: comfyanonymous/ComfyUI
item.description: The most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface.

item.title: louislam/uptime-kuma

item.description: OmniGen: Unified Image Generation. https://arxiv.org/pdf/2409.11340

item.title: sigoden/aichat
item.description: All-in-one LLM CLI tool featuring Shell Assistant, Chat-REPL, RAG, AI Tools & Agents, with access to OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, and more.
